summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-11, REQ-12, REQ-13, REQ-14) with comprehensive backend and frontend changes. The implementation includes multi-payment mode selection, multi-invoice support, alphanumeric invoice input, and compact button styling. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed based on the code evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend data migration module (migration.mo) converting old single-payment structure to new multi-payment structure
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention data migration, backward compatibility code, or conversion of existing payment records. The constraints mention 'Preserve existing payment record data structure in backend' but do not request active migration logic.

hallucinated_features.description: Query methods for filtering payments by user, invoice number, and payment mode
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend includes getPaymentsByUser, getPaymentsByInvoiceNumber, and getPaymentsByMode query methods. BuildRequest explicitly states in Non-goals: 'Advanced search or filtering in payment records'.

hallucinated_features.description: Invoice number hashing logic for alphanumeric values that cannot be parsed as numbers
hallucinated_features.reason: Frontend converts alphanumeric invoice numbers to bigint using a hash function when numeric parsing fails. BuildRequest REQ-12 only requires accepting text input and validation, not conversion or hashing logic for backend storage.
